comments.body:
@TomSweeneyRedHat, changelog needs update in rpm .spec file
https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/blob/master/contrib/rpm/buildah.spec
and
https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md
Hold until the OnBuild #722 gets merged.
Can I be a pain and ask to block on #684 and #732? Maybe too much self interest? 😏

#684 does not have a reproducer that we can use to diagnose, so blocking on that would be difficult.
I'm willing to wait on #732.

@rhatdan, I provided a complete reproducer for #684, third comment from the bottom.

https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues/684#issuecomment-392056945
I've updated with today's commits, but I think we should still hold on this @rhatdan.  Let's touch base Friday.
Looks like a test system flake.  Going to rekick the tests.
@pixdrift No we are releasing.  We will release again when #684 is fixed, as well as when we get the --layers (caching) support.
